metadata.preview:
model: gemma-4-26b
task: generate_mujoco_xml

instructions: |
  Generate a valid MuJoCo XML model of a simple ideal pendulum using SI units.

  Coordinate system:
    +x = right
    +y = upward
    +z = out of page

  Pendulum definition:
    - Massless rod
    - Spherical bob
    - Single hinge joint

  Joint specifications:
    - Type: hinge
    - Location: [0, 1, 0]
    - Axis: [0, 0, 1]

display.text:
model: gemma-4-26b
task: generate_mujoco_xml

instructions: |
  Generate a valid MuJoCo XML model of a simple ideal pendulum using SI units.

  Coordinate system:
    +x = right
    +y = upward
    +z = out of page

  Pendulum definition:
    - Massless rod
    - Spherical bob
    - Single hinge joint

  Joint specifications:
    - Type: hinge
    - Location: [0, 1, 0]
    - Axis: [0, 0, 1]
    - Damping: 0
    - Friction: 0
    - No losses

  Rod:
    - Length: 0.2485 m
    - Mass: 0
    - Collision: disabled

  Bob:
    - Shape: sphere
    - Diameter: 0.1 m
    - Mass: 1.0 kg

  Environment:
    - Gravity: [0, -9.81, 0]

  Initial conditions:
    - Pendulum starts horizontal
    - Bob positioned along +x from hinge
    - Initial angle: +90 degrees from vertical
    - Initial angular velocity: 0 rad/s

  MuJoCo requirements:
    - Enable energy computation
    - Exactly one hinge joint
    - Joint rotates only about z-axis
    - Use SI units

  Acceptance criteria:
    - Exactly one hinge joint
    - Rod length = 0.2485 m
    - Rod mass = 0 kg
    - Bob mass = 1 kg
    - Gravity = [0, -9.81, 0]
    - Initial angle = +90 degrees
    - Initial angular velocity = 0
    - Energy computation enabled

output_format:
  type: xml
  constraints:
    - Return only valid MuJoCo XML
    - No explanations
    - No additional text

state.title: YAML_creation/Temperature_Testing/V5_Temp_1.0/test22/ChatGPT-5.3-Instant_Pend.YAML

input.content:
<mujoco>
  <option gravity="0 0 -9.81" integrator="RK4" />

  <worldbody>
    <light diffuse=".5 .5 .5" pos="0 0 -3" dir="0 0 1"/>
    
    <body name="pendulum" pos="0 1 0">
      <joint name="hinge" type="hinge" axis="0 0 1" damping="0" friction="0"/>
      <body name="rod" pos="0 0 0">
        <!-- Rod is massless and collision is disabled as per instructions -->
        <geom type="capsule" fromto="0 0 0 0.2485 0 0" size="0.01" mass="0" contype="0" conaffinity="0"/>
        <body name="bob" pos="0.2485 0 0">
          <geom type="sphere" size="0.05" mass="1.0" rgba="1 0 0 1"/>
        </body>
      </body>
    </body>
  </worldbody>

  <equality>
    <!-- Placeholder for energy computation if required by specific MuJoCo versions, 
         though usually handled by the integrator and state. 
         The instructions specifically ask to "Enable energy computation". 
         In MuJoCo XML, this often refers to setting up sensors or using specific options. -->
  </equality>
  
  <sensor>
    <jointpos joint="hinge"/>
    <jointvel joint="hinge"/>
  </sensor>
</mujoco>

<mujoco>
  <option gravity="0 -9.81 0" integrator="RK4"/>

  <worldbody>
    <light diffuse=".5 .5 .5" pos="0 0 3" dir="0 1 0"/>
    <body name="hinge_body" pos="0 1 0">
      <joint name="hinge" type="hinge" axis="0 0 1" damping="0" friction="0"/>
      <geom name="rod" type="capsule" fromto="0 0 0 0.2485 0 0" size="0.001" mass="0" contype="0" conaffinity="0"/>
      <body name="bob" pos="0.2485 0 0">
        <geom name="bob_geom" type="sphere" size="0.05" mass="1.0"/>
      </body>
    </body>
  </worldbody>

  <sensor>
    <jointpos joint="hinge"/>
    <jointvel joint="hinge"/>
  </sensor>
</mujoco>

<mujoco>
  <option gravity="0 -9.81 0" integrator="RK4"/>

  <worldbody>
    <body name="pendulum_base" pos="0 1 0">
      <joint name="hinge" type="hinge" axis="0 0 1" damping="0" friction="0"/>
      <geom name="rod" type="capsule" fromto="0 0 0 0.2485 0 0" size="0.001" mass="0" contype="0" conaffinity="0"/>
      <body name="bob" pos="0.2485 0 0">
        <geom name="bob_geom" type="sphere" size="0.05" mass="1.0"/>
      </body>
    </body>
  </worldbody>

  <equality>
    <!-- No equality constraints needed for a simple pendulum -->
  </equality>

  <sensor>
    <jointpos joint="hinge"/>
    <jointvel joint="hinge"/>
  </sensor>
</mujoco>

<mujoco>
